architectureDecision.label: Full snapshot on updated
architectureDecision.rationale: planning.phase_note.updated carries complete note row plus refs array for simple deterministic replay.

readyReview.decision: Phase note updated events use full snapshot payloads (not delta/changedFields).

technicalBreakdown: Define planning.phase_note.created, updated, archived with full-row payloads and refs array.
Implement applier writing phase_notes and phase_note_refs; archived sets status without hard delete.
Wire publish hooks on phase journal mutation commands.
Add unit and hydrate tests for phase note event streams.

acceptanceCriteria: Phase note create/update/archive mutations publish planning events under git-event-log authority.
planning.phase_note.updated payloads include full note snapshot and refs (not delta-only).
Hydrate replays phase notes and refs identically on a fresh projection.
Idempotency keys on phase note commands prevent duplicate rows on replay.
